design_strategy.core_concept: A high-energy, clarity-focused digital workspace that treats math like a sport. High contrast, bold borders, and vibrant 'highlighter' accents.
design_strategy.emotional_tone: Confident, Energetic, Clear, Structured, playful but pro

headings.usage: All section headers, card titles, and big stats. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

mono.usage: Formulas, code snippets, numbers in data tables.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle dot patterns (bg-[url('/dots.svg')]) in neutral sections to avoid flatness.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (mix of col-span-1, col-span-2, row-span-2)

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white border-2 border-black hover:bg-neutral-800 hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000] transition-all duration-200 font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg active:translate-y-[0px] active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black hover:bg-neutral-50 hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000] transition-all duration-200 font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg
buttons.accent_edexcel: bg-blue-600 text-white border-2 border-black hover:bg-blue-500 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000]
buttons.accent_aqa: bg-pink-600 text-white border-2 border-black hover:bg-pink-500 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000]
buttons.accent_ocr: bg-orange-600 text-white border-2 border-black hover:bg-orange-500 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000]

cards.base: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1

tabs.list: bg-neutral-100 border-2 border-black p-1 rounded-lg gap-2
tabs.trigger: data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-black data-[state=active]:border-2 data-[state=active]:border-black data-[state=active]:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#000000] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-bold text-neutral-500 transition-all

component_styling.inputs: border-2 border-black rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000] transition-shadow placeholder:text-neutral-400 bg-white

icons_library.brand_logos: simple-icons (if needed for brands) or text based

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.hover_spring: whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }} transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 17 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add Space Grotesk and Outfit to index.html or import in CSS immediately.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the 'hard' shadows and new border widths.
NEO-BRUTALISM: Apply 'border-2 border-black' to almost every container/card. This is the core aesthetic.
EXAM BOARDS: Use the specific accent colors for the tabs: Blue for Edexcel, Pink for AQA, Orange for OCR.
AI EXPLANATIONS: Display these in a 'Chat Bubble' style container with rounded corners but sharp tails.
FORMULAS: Render math using KaTeX or MathJax if possible, or clean monospace font.
NAVIGATION: Make the top nav sticky with a glass effect (backdrop-blur-md) but keep the bottom border solid black.
MOBILE: Ensure the 'Topic Explorer' grid collapses to 1 column on mobile but keeps the vibrant card style.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
